rawAssistant: You and your little team think you're so prepared, don't you? With that cloak of yours, I'm sure it'll keep you dry for a whole five minutes in this damp air. But let me tell you, I've been studying the signs on that one-way road, and I can assure you, there's more to Hollowfen than just your little charms and twine vials. You're not even close to what I'm capable of. Bring it on, if you dare.
